mapper.select: select id, task_id, trace_id, document_id, engine_code, parse_text, parse_markdown_path, page_count, status, created_at, updated_at from document_parse_result where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: update document_parse_result set engine_code = #{engineCode}, parse_text = #{parseText}, parse_markdown_path = #{parseMarkdownPath}, page_count = #{pageCount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where task_id = #{taskId}
